  - button [e40]:
    - paragraph: Irazú Oncology is a biotech developing cancer immunotherapies using a proprietary Outer Membrane Vesicle (OMV) platform licensed from the University of Maryland. OMVs are naturally derived nanoparticles that deliver tumor-specific antigens to the immune system without requiring adjuvants, generating potent immune activation and durable anti-tumor memory. We are based in Maryland.
    - paragraph
    - paragraph: "The lead candidate, IRZ-03, has a dual-targeting approach: attacking cancer cells via MUC1 and CEA antigens while modulating the immunosuppressive tumor microenvironment through IDO/TDO pathway inhibition. Following positive FDA Pre-IND feedback in 2025, Irazú is advancing toward IND submission."
    - paragraph
    - paragraph: "Advantages of the OMV platform: off-the-shelf availability, cost-effective manufacturing, no cold-chain requirements, and multi-epitope targeting. This positions Irazú to deliver accessible, scalable immunotherapies for underserved patient populations worldwide."
    - button "See More" [e41]

  - button "Duo Oncology, backed by BeOne Medicines, is replacing multi-agent chemotherapy with single-infusion prodrugs. Its lead program, DUO-207, is a gemcitabine / paclitaxel combo prodrug medicine designed to create a stronger, safer foundation for targeted and immunotherapy combinations.With a favorable FDA pre-IND interaction and preclinical studies completed, Duo is advancing DUO-207 through an adaptive Phase 1b/2 strategy designed to optimize dose and schedule while generating early safety and response data from clinically relevant patients with pancreatic, lung or breast cancer. This efficient clinical path is designed to produce partner-grade data by 2029.Duo has received strong support from the National Institutes of Health, including multiple SBIR awards, product characterization support from NCI NanoCharacterization Program and an NIH Investor Initiative award. See More" [e61]:
    - paragraph: Duo Oncology, backed by BeOne Medicines, is replacing multi-agent chemotherapy with single-infusion prodrugs. Its lead program, DUO-207, is a gemcitabine / paclitaxel combo prodrug medicine designed to create a stronger, safer foundation for targeted and immunotherapy combinations.
    - paragraph: With a favorable FDA pre-IND interaction and preclinical studies completed, Duo is advancing DUO-207 through an adaptive Phase 1b/2 strategy designed to optimize dose and schedule while generating early safety and response data from clinically relevant patients with pancreatic, lung or breast cancer. This efficient clinical path is designed to produce partner-grade data by 2029.
    - paragraph: Duo has received strong support from the National Institutes of Health, including multiple SBIR awards, product characterization support from NCI NanoCharacterization Program and an NIH Investor Initiative award.
    - button "See More" [e62]

  - button [e82]:
    - paragraph:
      - strong: New targets and epitopes to bind, more ways to fight, more patients to help.
    - paragraph:
      - text: Sanavia Oncology Inc. is a New York-based biotech company with a founding team from Rockefeller University, Memorial Sloan Kettering Cancer Center, Weill Cornell Medicine, Columbia University, Amgen, Genentech, Roche and Gilead. Sanavia’s pioneering epitope discovery technology identifies novel cancer-specific epitopes in validated cancer targets that are present in majority of patients across multiple cancer types and selects the best epitope for ADC, CAR-T or T cell engagers (TCEs). Sanavia combines antibody screening technology with Machine Learning and AI to pick the best functionally and structurally optimized ADC, CAR-T or TCEs that bind to their epitopes with atomic precision and work in vivo.
      - strong: SANA-01 program targets a novel epitope present in 75% of lung, 70% of TNBC, 70% of ovarian, 40% of colon, 75% of pancreatic, and 55% of gastric cancers.
    - button "See More" [e83]

  - 'button "US-based clinical stage (Phase II ready) oncology drug development company. Accelerated drug development pathway for multiple drug-resistant tumors - 4th line therapy for metastatic colotectal cancer (mCRC). ORR in Phase I trial is 22%, with TGI of 62% No drug related serious adverse evets (SAEs) in Phase I trial Indications: Multiple drug-resistant solid tumors; metastatic Colorectal cancer (mCRC); SCLC (Small cell lung cancer) without targets; NSCLC (Non small cell lung cancer); Ovarian Cancer A novel, patented drug-to-drug conjugate of Topoisomerase I and II dual inhibitors. Favorable safety and efficacy in patients with solid tumor who were resistant to previous chemotherapy, radiation therapy and immunotherapy. See More"':

  - button "OncoLab is developing ANGel, a localized combination immuno-oncology platform designed to unlock greater value from existing antibody and payload-based therapies in solid tumors. ANGel is not another ADC or bispecific antibody. It is designed to bring ADC-like tumor killing and bispecific-like immune engagement together at the injection site through sustained, localized activity. By spatially organizing multiple therapeutic mechanisms within the tumor microenvironment, ANGel aims to improve therapeutic index, enable local combination strategies, and expand the clinical utility of existing oncology assets. OncoLab is seeking strategic partnerships and co-development opportunities with pharma and biotech companies focused on immuno-oncology, antibody therapeutics, payload-based therapies, and next-generation solid tumor platforms. See More" [e126]:
    - paragraph: OncoLab is developing ANGel, a localized combination immuno-oncology platform designed to unlock greater value from existing antibody and payload-based therapies in solid tumors.
    - paragraph

By spatially organizing multiple therapeutic mechanisms within the tumor microenvironment, ANGel aims to improve therapeutic index, enable local combination strategies, and expand the clinical utility of existing oncology assets.
    - paragraph
    - paragraph: OncoLab is seeking strategic partnerships and co-development opportunities with pharma and biotech companies focused on immuno-oncology, antibody therapeutics, payload-based therapies, and next-generation solid tumor platforms.
    - button "See More" [e127]

  - button "Korea Institute of Radiological & Medical Sciences is a government-funded biomedical research institute focused on translational oncology and radiological medicine. Our laboratory develops innovative targeted anticancer therapeutics, with current business development efforts centered on two differentiated kinase inhibitor programs targeting MASTL and NUAK1 for difficult-to-treat solid tumors, including triple-negative breast cancer and pancreatic cancer. We are actively seeking global partners for licensing, co-development, and translational collaboration. See More" [e134]:

  - button "Forlong Biotechnology is a clinical-stage biotech company focusing on transformative immune-oncology therapy based on engineered cytokines. FL115, an IL-15 superagonist, has shown best-in-class clinical profile in multiple Phase 1/2 studies and will advance to Phase 3 for NMIBC in 2027. FL116, an anti-PD1/IL-18 bispecific, has shown strong anti-tumor activities in vivo and significant safety margin in the pilot monkey study, and will advance to Phase 1 early 2027. See More" [e142]:
    - paragraph: Forlong Biotechnology is a clinical-stage biotech company focusing on transformative immune-oncology therapy based on engineered cytokines. FL115, an IL-15 superagonist, has shown best-in-class clinical profile in multiple Phase 1/2 studies and will advance to Phase 3 for NMIBC in 2027. FL116, an anti-PD1/IL-18 bispecific, has shown strong anti-tumor activities in vivo and significant safety margin in the pilot monkey study, and will advance to Phase 1 early 2027.

  - button [e150]:
    - paragraph:
      - strong: Ever Supreme Bio Technology is a Taiwan-based biotech company developing next-generation cell, extracellular vesicle, and peptide-based therapeutics for solid tumors and neurodegenerative diseases. Its lead program, CAR001, is an off-the-shelf allogeneic γδ T-cell therapy engineered with mRNA to express an HLA-G CAR and secrete a CD3 × PD-L1 BiTE. CAR001 has US and Taiwan IND clearance and is in Phase I/IIa trials for multiple solid tumors, with early clinical activity, including a GBM partial response, and a favorable safety profile to date.
    - paragraph:
      - strong: Ever Supreme is also advancing EXO001, an exosome-based in vivo CAR-T platform published in Advanced Science, designed to deliver CAR.BiTE DNA directly to T cells without viral vectors. For CNS diseases, the company is developing dEV-001 for Parkinson’s disease and PAA peptide-based approaches for Alzheimer’s disease. The company seeks global licensing, co-development, and strategic partnerships.
    - button "See More" [e151]

  - button [e158]:
    - paragraph: "OPM is a clinical stage biotechnology company focused on novel kinase inhibitor research starting from its Nanocyclix(R) medicinal chemistry platform of potent and selective small molecule macrocyclic inhibitors. Two asvanced assets have successfully completed clinical Phase 1 in healthy volunteers: OPM-201 is a potentially best-in-class LRRK2 inhibitor for Parkinson Disease. The program has recently received nearly 7 million US$ suport from the Michael J Fox Foundation and is expected to be tested in patients in early 2027. OPM-101 is a RIPK2 inhibitor that is ready to move in a Phase 1b/2 POC trial in combination with pembrolizumab in advanced melanoma patients resistant to anti-PD1. The sudy will start in 2026. Other compounds in our RIPK2 inhibitor franchise are available for progression in the inflammatory/IBD field. These different assets/programs are available for partnering/outlicensing."
    - button "See More" [e159]

  - button "IMBiologics (IMB) is a publicly traded, clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing differentiated biologic therapies for immunology and inflammation (I&I) and cancer. By integrating innovative target biology with advanced antibody engineering and proprietary multivalent platform technologies, the company is advancing a pipeline of next-generation therapeutics designed to address significant unmet medical needs. IMBiologics is committed to delivering impactful therapies to patients while creating long-term value through scientific innovation and global collaboration. See More" [e166]:
    - paragraph: IMBiologics (IMB) is a publicly traded, clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing differentiated biologic therapies for immunology and inflammation (I&I) and cancer. By integrating innovative target biology with advanced antibody engineering and proprietary multivalent platform technologies, the company is advancing a pipeline of next-generation therapeutics designed to address significant unmet medical needs. IMBiologics is committed to delivering impactful therapies to patients while creating long-term value through scientific innovation and global collaboration.

  - button [e174]:
    - list:
      - listitem: "Golden Biotechnology will be initiating its pivotal global Phase 3 study evaluating Antroquinonol as First-Line treatment for Metastatic Pancreatic Cancer in combination with Nab-Paclitaxel and Gemcitabine. This follows promising Phase 2 results, where Antroquinonol combined with standard therapy demonstrated a significant improvement in Median Overall Survival : 14.1 months vs 8.5 months with standard therapy alone. Offering a clinically meaningful survival advantage. Antroquinonol has also received Orphan Drug Designation from both the FDA and EMA, underscoring its potential impact in this area"
      - listitem: Golden Biotechnology Corp is a leading biopharmaceutical company focused on discovery and clinical development of innovative therapeutic new drugs (NCE) for Oncology and Rare Disease
      - listitem: It's key compound Antroquinonol have completed numerous Phase 1 and 2 studies in NSCLC, AML and Pancreatic Cancer with promising results.
    - button "See More" [e175]

  - button "Myllia performs CRISPR screens for biotech and pharma clients. We perturb primary human cells and cancer cell lines with CRISPRn, CRISPRi or CRISPRa and combine it with various read-outs such as fitness, FACS, CITE-Seq or scRNA-Seq. Our CRISPR-based functional genomics platform enables drug target identification/validation in primary cellular models that ultimately translate to human disease biology. See More" [e190]:
    - paragraph: Myllia performs CRISPR screens for biotech and pharma clients. We perturb primary human cells and cancer cell lines with CRISPRn, CRISPRi or CRISPRa and combine it with various read-outs such as fitness, FACS, CITE-Seq or scRNA-Seq. Our CRISPR-based functional genomics platform enables drug target identification/validation in primary cellular models that ultimately translate to human disease biology.

  - button "Optieum Biotechnologies, Inc. is a peri-clinical biotechnology company developing next-generation CAR-T cell therapies. Optieum’s lead program, OPTF01, targets fibroblast activation protein alpha (FAPα) to address both tumor cells and the tumor microenvironment/Cancer Associated Fibroblasts. OPTF01 is expected to file an IND later this year, with glioblastoma as the first target indication - with potential application to broader solid tumors, autoimmune and inflammatory diseases beyond.The Company leverages its proprietary Eumbody System, a functional CAR screening and optimization platform designed to identify constructs with balanced activation, persistence, and durability. See More" [e205]:
    - paragraph: Optieum Biotechnologies, Inc. is a peri-clinical biotechnology company developing next-generation CAR-T cell therapies. Optieum’s lead program, OPTF01, targets fibroblast activation protein alpha (FAPα) to address both tumor cells and the tumor microenvironment/Cancer Associated Fibroblasts. OPTF01 is expected to file an IND later this year, with glioblastoma as the first target indication - with potential application to broader solid tumors, autoimmune and inflammatory diseases beyond.
    - paragraph: The Company leverages its proprietary Eumbody System, a functional CAR screening and optimization platform designed to identify constructs with balanced activation, persistence, and durability.
    - button "See More" [e206]

  - button "Lannacheng (LNC) is a subsidiary of Dongcheng Pharmaceutical. We focus on developing first-in-class, integrated theranostic radiopharmaceuticals for oncology. Our pipeline covers a broad range of targets including PSMA, FAP, integrin αvβ3 and more, using small molecules, peptides, and antibodies to address prostate cancer, gliomas, neuroendocrine tumors, and other solid tumors. Backed by Dongcheng’s end-to-end nuclear medicine capabilities—from radionuclide production to manufacturing and commercialization—LNC is rapidly advancing innovation in the field. See More" [e213]:
    - paragraph: Lannacheng (LNC) is a subsidiary of Dongcheng Pharmaceutical. We focus on developing first-in-class, integrated theranostic radiopharmaceuticals for oncology. Our pipeline covers a broad range of targets including PSMA, FAP, integrin αvβ3 and more, using small molecules, peptides, and antibodies to address prostate cancer, gliomas, neuroendocrine tumors, and other solid tumors. Backed by Dongcheng’s end-to-end nuclear medicine capabilities—from radionuclide production to manufacturing and commercialization—LNC is rapidly advancing innovation in the field.
